name: intent-mismatch
description: PR claims to add validation but the implementation never wires it in — a material mismatch.

pr.title: Add email validation to signup
pr.author: casey
pr.description: Validate the email field on signup and reject malformed addresses before submit.

files.src/signup/form.ts: export const submit = (email: string) => api.signup({ email });

agentResponse.summary: A validator helper was added but submit() never calls it, so the stated validation intent is not delivered.

findings.title: Validation helper is never invoked
findings.detail: isEmail() is defined but submit() passes the raw email straight to api.signup without validating.

findings.title: No rejection path for malformed addresses
findings.detail: The PR promises to reject malformed addresses before submit; no branch handles the invalid case.

agentResponse.intentSummary: Validate email on signup and block malformed addresses before submission.
unmetIntent: Email is not validated before submit
